{{Infobox character
| name = Daruman the First
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman the First]] was the ruler who united his [[Iteration]] and ushered it into a golden age.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman the First]] was a warrior who fought planet-eaters.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman the First]] was known for his wisdom and integrity.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman the First]] ruled for three hundred years.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
